dir:src.userDescription: Holds the complete golden demo service that brings together health checks, personalized greetings, and friendly farewells. This makes the service easy to try, run, and share with others.

dir:src/golden_app.userDescription: Bundles the service's three main interactions into a runnable demo. It provides health checks, personalized greetings, and friendly farewells in one place. This makes the service easy to try and share.

file:src/golden_app/__init__.py.userDescription: Holds the version number for the golden fixture package. This helps track which release is being used.

file:src/golden_app/app.py.displayName: Demo app with three friendly interactions
file:src/golden_app/app.py.userDescription: Brings together the service's three main interactions in one place. It provides a quick health check, personalized greetings, and friendly farewells. This makes the demo easy to run and share.

file:src/golden_app/core.py.userDescription: Contains the logic for creating friendly greetings and farewells. It handles names consistently and uses defaults when needed. This ensures pleasant interactions throughout the service.

py:boundary:unresolved.displayName: FastAPI app creation and route registration
py:boundary:unresolved.userDescription: This is not runnable code by itself; it is a grouping for calls from your functions toward targets this index does not show as their own function boxes. These calls include creating a FastAPI web application instance and registering HTTP route handlers for endpoints like /greet, /goodbye, and /health.

raw-root.userDescription: Offers a friendly demo service with health checks, personalized greetings, and farewells. This makes it easy for anyone to try out and share a working example.

sym:src/golden_app/app.py:golden_app.app.displayName: Demo app with three friendly interactions
sym:src/golden_app/app.py:golden_app.app.userDescription: Brings together the service's three main interactions in one place. It provides a quick health check, personalized greetings, and friendly farewells. This makes the demo easy to run and share.
Provides a polite goodbye using the given name. It handles missing names gracefully with a default. This creates a positive final impression in conversations.
Someone gives a name and gets a short welcome line back. If no name is provided, it defaults to a friendly greeting. This makes interactions feel personal and welcoming.
Offers a simple yes/no on whether the live service is responding. This helps operators confirm everything is working without needing to test the main features.

sym:src/golden_app/core.py:golden_app.co.userDescription: Takes a name and crafts a polite farewell. It cleans up the name and uses a default when needed. This ensures consistent, pleasant goodbyes throughout the service.
Takes a name and crafts a friendly greeting. It cleans up the name and uses a default when needed. This ensures consistent, pleasant hellos throughout the service.
